title: Allergists and Immunologists
description: Diagnose, treat, and help prevent allergic diseases and disease processes affecting the immune system.

tasks.text: Diagnose or treat allergic or immunologic conditions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Educate patients about diagnoses, prognoses, or treatments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Order or perform diagnostic tests such as skin pricks and intradermal, patch, or delayed hypersensitivity tests.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prescribe medication such as antihistamines, antibiotics, and nasal, oral, topical, or inhaled glucocorticosteroids.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interpret diagnostic test results to make appropriate differential diagnoses.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop individualized treatment plans for patients, considering patient preferences, clinical data, or the risks and benefits of therapies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide therapies, such as allergen immunotherapy or immunoglobin therapy, to treat immune conditions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assess the risks and benefits of therapies for allergic and immunologic disorders.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Coordinate the care of patients with other health care professionals or support staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform allergen provocation tests such as nasal, conjunctival, bronchial, oral, food, or medication challenges.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Engage in self-directed learning and continuing education activities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide allergy or immunology consultation or education to physicians or other health care providers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct laboratory or clinical research on allergy or immunology topics.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Present research findings at national meetings or in peer-reviewed journals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
